---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the MnemoForge CLI
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: yaka0007
---

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.
For example: "A `mnemoforge add component` command that scaffolds a new sub-component inside an existing module."

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or examples.
